qa_pair.question: In the fixture deck MCP Eval::Agent Basics, how many notes have the tag mcp-eval?
According to the fixture, which MCP tool lists all Anki decks?
According to the fixture, which two MCP tools add and remove tags from notes?
Which MCP resource lists every tag in the Anki collection?
Which MCP resource lists decks together with deck IDs?
What is the maximum number of notes accepted by one anki_batch_create_notes request?
Which field names are required for the Basic note type?
What should an agent call before creating notes for a custom note type?
What does a successful sync request guarantee?
qa_pair.answer: Only that Anki accepted the request; it does not confirm AnkiWeb completion.

qa_pair.question: Which structured result field should agents parse instead of scraping text?
